conversation.text: hey Tom, noticed you're in the agency space. loads of agencies using us lately to catch their own inbound leads actually. what's your current follow-up look like for new enquiries?
Currently manual. I try to call them within 10 mins but if I'm on a call it can be hours. It's killing our conversion.

yeah that's literally the gap we exist for. the agent hits them instantly while they're still hot, qualifies them, and books them straight into your calendar|||different world when every lead is already qualified before you talk to them
yeah works perfectly with GHL. pushes everything there so your automations can still run in the background|||Louis handles the GHL setups, want to grab 20 mins with him to see how it looks?
